candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A-like row associated with cost of revenue. However, it appears to be a component within the selected parent row 'Cost of product and service revenue' because the parent total equals Labor & Related Expenses in Cost of Revenue + this row + Cost of product revenue - Balancing value. Therefore adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A should be added. The visible COGS-related D&A row is embedded in the already selected COGS parent bucket.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses', since that parent total equals Labor & Related Expenses in Research & Development + this D&A row + Research and development expenses - Balancing value. It is therefore already embedded. Also, the same R&D parent row is already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would risk distortion/double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This appears to be a component of the selected parent row 'General and administrative expenses', since that parent total equals Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses + this D&A row + General and administrative expenses - Balancing value. It is therefore already embedded in the selected XSGA bucket.

variables.notes: No separate XSGA D&A should be added. Both visible SG&A/R&D D&A rows are sub-components of already selected parent operating expense rows.
